hypotheses.name: Layer-wise B-cell community purity emergence
hypotheses.method: k=10 kNN greedy-modularity communities per layer (L0-L11). Fisher OR for B-cell marker enrichment in PC1-negative community. Spearman rho(layer, OR).
hypotheses.result_value: rho=0.081, p=0.804 (not significant); but L2=OR16, L3=OR12, L5=OR15 early-layer peaks
hypotheses.next_action: Reframe as early-layer geometry: B-cell separation baked in from L2, not a late-layer crystallization. Test whether L2 community maps biologically.

hypotheses.name: PC2/PC3 cell-type axes at L11
hypotheses.method: SVD at L11 on 195 in-vocab genes. Mann-Whitney AUROC for T-cell (n=14), Myeloid (n=6), B-cell (n=9) at PC2+/PC2-/PC3+/PC3- poles.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Mann-Whitney AUROC (p-values for T-cell/Myeloid on PC2, PC3)
hypotheses.result_value: PC2 T-cell AUROC=0.442 p=0.767; PC2 Myeloid AUROC=0.618 p=0.168; all PC2/PC3 p>0.14
hypotheses.next_action: Retire PC2/PC3 T-cell/myeloid axes for 195-gene set. Consider full-vocab expansion for myeloid axis test.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: No significant T-cell or Myeloid enrichment in PC2/PC3 with current 195-gene set.

hypotheses.name: Expression-level confound test for B-cell PC1 signal
hypotheses.method: At L11: (1) Pearson r(PC1, L2 norm); (2) regress PC1 on L2 norm, test B-cell in residual AUROC; (3) bootstrap null: 1000 random 9-gene sets, empirical p.
hypotheses.result_value: empirical_p=0.000, z=-3.06; B-cell residual AUROC=0.214 p=0.002; L2 norm confound AUROC=0.601 p=0.847
hypotheses.next_action: Replicate confound test at L2 (where OR is highest). Also test: does the B-cell signal survive gene co-expression shuffle (expression matrix shuffle).
